route_policy.note: Routes reference fictional POI ids from sample-pois.json and are intended for prototype interaction only.

routes.name: Visitor Route: North Gate to Building 3
access_requirements: Visitor should be authorized by the resident before entering residential building areas.
Building entrance access should follow property access-control rules.

waypoints.instruction: Enter from the North Gate and pass the security desk.
Walk south along the main landscape path.
Turn right at the central garden and continue toward Building 3.
Arrive at Building 3. Use the authorized visitor access method to enter.

ai_prompt_examples: How can my guest get from the north gate to Building 3?
Guide my visitor from North Gate to Building 3.

routes.name: Daily Task: Building 3 to Package Locker
access_requirements: Resident identity is required for package pickup.

waypoints.instruction: Exit Building 3 from the main lobby.
Follow the inner walkway west.
Arrive at the package locker and follow the pickup instructions.

ai_prompt_examples: Where is the package locker from Building 3?
Show me the route from Building 3 to the package locker.

routes.name: Activity Route: Building 3 to Kids' Playground
access_requirements: Activity signup may be required before check-in.
Children should be accompanied by guardians.

waypoints.instruction: Start from Building 3 and head toward the central garden.
Pass the garden path and follow signs to the playground.
Arrive at the kids' playground and check in for the activity.

ai_prompt_examples: How do I get to the weekend parent-child activity?
Show me the route from Building 3 to the kids' activity.

routes.name: Community Explorer Loop: Building 3 to Playground, Court, and Clubhouse
access_requirements: Residents should avoid private building areas unless authorized.
Children should be accompanied by guardians during exploration.

waypoints.instruction: Start at Building 3 and accept the Community Explorer quest.
Check in at the kids' playground and unlock the first discovery stamp.
Visit the basketball court and discover the sports meetup side quest.
Finish at the clubhouse and claim the Community Explorer badge.

ai_prompt_examples: Show me a fun route to discover the community.
I am new here, help me explore the community.

routes.name: Sports Side Quest: Building 3 to Basketball Court
access_requirements: Resident identity is required to join the meetup.
Court usage rules and participant capacity should be confirmed before check-in.

waypoints.instruction: Start from Building 3 and accept the evening sports side quest.
Follow the east walkway and look for the illuminated court entrance.
Arrive at the basketball court, confirm the meetup rules, and check in.

ai_prompt_examples: Find a basketball game in the community.

routes.name: World Maintenance Loop: Playground to Waste Point and Property Center
access_requirements: Residents should only inspect publicly accessible shared spaces.
Reports must avoid faces, unit numbers, vehicle plates, and other private information.

waypoints.instruction: Start at the playground and observe lighting, surfaces, and shared facilities.
Check the shared path and waste point for sanitation or obstruction issues.
Submit one location-aware issue and follow its resident-visible status.

ai_prompt_examples: Start a world maintenance side quest.
Help me report an issue in a shared outdoor space.

routes.name: Repair Report: Broken Light near Kids' Playground

repair_context.example_description: A pathway light near the kids' playground is not working.

waypoints.instruction: Select the kids' playground POI as the issue location.
The repair report is routed to the property center dashboard.

ai_prompt_examples: I want to report a broken light near the kids' playground.
Create a repair report for the playground light.

routes.name: Robot Patrol: Fire Passage and Garage Entrance

inspection_goals: Check whether the fire passage is blocked.
Check whether the garage entrance is clear.
Return inspection results to the property dashboard.

access_requirements: Robot operation should follow privacy, safety, and community management rules.

waypoints.instruction: Start from the property center after task approval.
Inspect the fire passage and detect possible obstructions.
Inspect the underground garage entrance and capture abnormal conditions.
Pass the waste collection point and optionally check sanitation status.
Return to the property center and upload the patrol report.

ai_prompt_examples: Generate a patrol route for a service robot.
Create a patrol task for the fire passage and garage entrance.
